context: Evaluates the agent's ability to accept a user correction to the recap, apply it, re-present, and proceed.

checklist.name: Correction accepted without debate
checklist.description: The agent does not argue with the user's correction or claim they said something else

checklist.name: Recap corrected and re-presented
checklist.description: The corrected recap is shown again with standard #2 as 'Revise'

checklist.name: Confirmation re-requested
checklist.description: The agent asks the user to confirm the corrected recap before writing

checklist.name: Report matches corrected recap
checklist.description: The final report correctly shows 'Revise' for standard #2
